hero.title:
Your Customers Are Online.
Is Your Business?
hero.subtitle: Stop losing customers to competitors with better websites. We build affordable apps, WhatsApp automations, and digital tools that turn foot traffic into repeat revenue — starting from ₹15,000.

services.subtitle: HOW WE HELP
services.title: Practical tools that make you money

items.title: Smart Websites & Mobile Apps
items.desc: Beautiful, fast websites and apps that your customers actually find on Google. Mobile-first design, WhatsApp-integrated, and ready to take orders — not just look pretty.

items.title: WhatsApp AI Assistant
items.desc: Auto-reply to inquiries, send booking confirmations, and capture leads while you sleep. Your business runs 24/7.

items.title: Customer Tracking System
items.desc: Replace spreadsheets with a real system. Track leads, sales, inventory, and staff — all in one place.

items.title: Local SEO & Google Business Profile
items.desc: Get found when customers search "near me." We optimize your Google Maps listing, build local citations, and make sure your business shows up before your competitors — organically, no ads needed.

items: Customer calls go unanswered after hours
Leads written on paper, lost in a week
No online presence — invisible on Google

Paying ₹50K/month for a "digital marketing agency" with no results

items: WhatsApp AI bot replies instantly, captures every lead

estimator.subtitle: COST CALCULATOR
estimator.title: What Will It Cost?
estimator.desc: Get a transparent, instant estimate. No hidden fees, no surprise invoices. We price honestly so you can budget confidently.

success_stories.subtitle: SUCCESS STORIES
success_stories.title: Real problems. Real solutions. Real growth.

items.title: From paper bookings to a real-time CRM
items.problem: Losing track of bookings on paper, missing follow-ups, and double-booking rooms during peak season.
items.solution: A custom CRM and booking engine with real-time sync, automated WhatsApp guest confirmations, and a staff dashboard.

items.title: Zero lead leakage for a real estate firm
items.problem: Managing hundreds of real estate leads via scattered spreadsheets. Sales team losing hot leads daily.
items.solution: A fully digital real estate lead management platform with auto-assignment, follow-up reminders, and pipeline analytics.

items.title: Digital presence for the world's largest school
items.problem: Outdated web presence that didn't reflect the school's global reputation. No structured admission inquiry system.
items.solution: Modern, SEO-optimized website with integrated admission forms, WhatsApp inquiry routing, and parent portal.

grand_cta.title: Ready to Take Your 🏪 Business Online?
grand_cta.description: Join the local businesses who stopped losing customers to competitors with better digital presence. Book a free 30-minute consultation — no pitch, just honest advice.
